global.themeSystemUnsupported: Samsung Internet does not support system theme detection. Please select Dark or Light manually.

permissionDesc.latest: New sessions keep the permission mode from the previous session
permissionDesc.plan: Suggests a plan before code changes
permissionDesc.default: Always asks for confirmation before editing files

global.autoApproveSafetyChecks: Auto-approve safety checks in Bypass mode
global.autoApproveSafetyChecksDesc: When enabled, CLI safety check prompts are automatically approved without user confirmation in Bypass mode.

permissionSyncDesc.always: Always syncs and remembers per-session permission mode

global.markdownDesc: Default mode when opening markdown files.
global.fileExplorerDesc: Default view mode when opening the file explorer.
global.panelDefaultOpenDesc: Automatically open the quick panel when entering a session on desktop.
global.panelDefaultSideDesc: Default side for the quick panel. 'Last used' keeps the side from the previous session.
global.chatTimeoutDesc: Time to automatically abort request when no response is received.

toast.serverTimeout: Server response timed out. Please check manually.
toast.settingSavedFailed: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

advanced.serverRestartDesc: Builds the entire project and restarts the server in production mode
advanced.systemPromptWarningDetail: Incorrect system prompt modifications can significantly degrade response quality. Keep the default if you're unsure.
advanced.promptNoProject: Select a project to view the current system prompt.
advanced.maxThinkingTokensDesc: Maximum tokens for model reasoning process (1,024 ~ 128,000)
advanced.defaultEffortDesc: Default thinking effort level for new sessions. When not set, the SDK default (High) is used.
advanced.chatCheckpointingDesc: Save file snapshots during chat for rewind/restore
advanced.queueCheckpointingDesc: Save file snapshots during queue execution (increases JSONL file size)
advanced.showThinkingBlocksDesc: Displays collapsed 'thinking' blocks above responses on recent models (Opus 4.7+). Turn off for slightly faster first-token latency (cost is unchanged).

confirm.serverRestart: This will rebuild and restart the server. Continue?
confirm.updateVersion: This will update to v{{version}} and restart the server. Continue?
confirm.resetAllSettings:
Reset all project settings.

• Model/Permission Mode overrides will be removed
• Project hiding will be disabled

Continue?

telegram.loadError: An error occurred while loading Telegram settings.
telegram.setupStep1Suffix: to create a bot and get the Bot Token
telegram.envPriority: Preferences setting takes priority over environment variable.
telegram.baseUrlHint: URL included in notifications for quick access. Use your internal IP instead of localhost.
telegram.enableHint: Please set Bot Token and Chat ID first.
telegram.notifyPermission: Permission request — When 🔐 permission confirmation or ❓ question is needed
telegram.notifyError: Error — When ❌ an error occurs during streaming
telegram.notifyQueueStart: Queue start — When queue execution starts
telegram.notifyQueueComplete: Queue complete — After all items are processed
telegram.notifyQueueError: Queue error — On @pauseword match or SDK error
telegram.notifyQueueInput: Queue input request — When user response is needed
telegram.alwaysNotify: Always notify — Send even when session is visible
telegram.alwaysNotifyHint: By default, notifications are suppressed when you're viewing the session.

project.loadError: An error occurred while loading settings.

basicChatItems: Type a message in the chat input and press Enter (desktop) or the send button (mobile) to send
Image attachment: Upload images via the clip icon or paste (Ctrl+V)
New session: Start a new chat session with the "+" button in the header
Switch sessions: Access previous sessions via the clock icon
slashCommandItems: Type / in the chat input to see available commands
Frequently used commands can be added to ★ favorites
Add favorites: Click ★ or long-press in the command palette
Favorites appear as quick access buttons above the input area
help.permissionPlanDesc: Suggests a plan before code changes
help.permissionDefaultDesc: Always asks for confirmation before editing files
help.permissionNote: You can change the default Permission Mode in Settings > Global Settings or Project Settings.
bmadMethodItems: BMad Method is an AI-powered development workflow framework
Install BMad Core to a project via the "BMad Setup" button on the project page
After installation, quickly invoke specialized agents from the BMad agent button (bottom-right of chat)
Agents: SM (Scrum Master), PM (Project Manager), Dev (Developer), QA (Quality Assurance), etc.

info.title: Claude Code Account
info.refreshFailed: Could not fetch account info. Try starting a chat first, then retry.
info.emptyHint: Account info fills in automatically after you send your first chat, or click Refresh to fetch now.
info.usageEmpty: Rate limit info not available. Available for Claude.ai subscribers.

account.changeSuccess: Password changed. Please sign in again.

empty.title: No skills installed.
empty.description: Add skills under <projectRoot>/.claude/skills/ or ~/.claude/skills/, or install a plugin bundle.

bundle.title: Bundle resources
bundle.binaryReadOnly: Binary file — Hammoc UI cannot edit it.
bundle.truncatedAtDepth: Bundle tree truncated at the depth limit.

conflict.title: Skill name conflict
conflict.renameInvalid: Invalid name — empty, unchanged, or contains reserved characters.

error.crossDevice: This skill lives across a mount boundary — copy with an external file manager.

editor.rawParseError: Frontmatter cannot be parsed — fix the fenced YAML to return to Form mode.
editor.staleBanner: This skill was changed externally — your save was rejected. Latest contents loaded.

malformed.title: Some skills were skipped because their frontmatter is invalid:

empty.title: No MCP servers configured.
empty.description: Add an mcpServers entry to <projectRoot>/.mcp.json or your global ~/.claude/.mcp.json, or install a plugin bundle that includes MCP servers.
empty.noGlobalSupport: Claude Code does not recognise a global MCP file on this version — only project-scope and plugin-bundle MCPs are visible.

banner.freshSpawn: Takes effect on your next user message.

secret.title: Secret-looking values detected
secret.intro: The following fields look like secrets and will be copied as plain text:
secret.ack: I understand and want to copy with secrets.

conflict.title: Server name conflict
conflict.renameInvalid: Invalid name — empty, unchanged, or contains reserved characters.
conflict.pluginRootWarning: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} reference will not resolve outside the plugin bundle.

error.crossDevice: This server lives across a mount boundary — copy with an external file manager.

typeChange.title: Type change will discard fields
typeChange.intro: Switching from {{from}} to {{to}} will remove fields that don't apply to the new type.

editor.rawParseError: Server config cannot be parsed — fix the JSON to return to Form mode.
editor.staleBanner: This server config was changed externally. Reload from disk or overwrite with your edits.

malformed.title: Some MCP servers were skipped because their config is invalid:

empty.title: No hooks configured.
empty.description: Add a hook entry to <projectRoot>/.claude/settings.json or your global ~/.claude/settings.json under the hooks field, or install a plugin bundle that registers hooks.
empty.perEvent: No hooks for {{event}}. Click + Add to create one.

banner.freshSpawn: Takes effect on your next user message.
banner.promptCost: Prompt-type hooks invoke the LLM each time and incur cost/latency.

hook.parallelExecutionBadge_one: Runs in parallel with 1 hook from another source.
hook.parallelExecutionBadge_other: Runs in parallel with {{count}} hooks from other sources.

warning.title: Review hook before copying
warning.commandIntro: This hook runs an arbitrary shell command on every trigger. Make sure you trust the source.
warning.promptIntro: This hook invokes the LLM on every trigger and incurs cost and latency.
warning.ack: I have reviewed the body and want to copy.

conflict.title: An identical hook already exists
conflict.intro: An entry with the same matcher and body already exists in {{targetScope}}.
conflict.duplicateInfo: Duplicate added — both entries will run in parallel.
conflict.pluginRootWarning: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} reference will not resolve outside the plugin bundle.

matcher.invalidRegex: Matcher must be a valid regex.
matcher.sharedWithSiblings: This matcher is shared with {{count}} other hook(s) in the same group.

applyOption.title: Apply matcher change to:
applyOption.sharedWithSiblings: All {{count}} hook(s) in this group (default — keeps the group intact)
applyOption.splitFromGroup: Only this hook (extract it into its own group)
applyOption.afterSplitToast: This hook moved to a new group — sibling hooks kept the original matcher.

editor.matcherHelp: Matcher info — regex/pipes/wildcards allowed. Empty = match all.
editor.timeoutHint: 0 or empty = use Claude Code default.
editor.promptTypeUnsupported: This CLI version does not support prompt-type hooks.

required.command: command body is required for type=command.
required.prompt: prompt body is required for type=prompt.

editor.rawParseError: Hook config cannot be parsed — fix the JSON to return to Form mode.
editor.staleBanner: This hook was changed externally — choose how to resolve.

decisionForm.title: PreToolUse decision builder
decisionForm.collapsedHint: Build a permissionDecision JSON via form, or use a quick template below.
decisionForm.systemMessagePlaceholder: Reason for deny / ask. Leave empty to omit.
decisionForm.updatedInputInvalid: Updated input must be valid JSON.

malformed.title: Some hooks were skipped because their config is invalid:

empty.title: No slash commands configured.
empty.description: Add a command file under <projectRoot>/.claude/commands/ or your global ~/.claude/commands/ directory, or install a plugin bundle that ships commands.
empty.perDirectory: No commands in this directory yet.

banner.appliesNextMessage: Saved. Takes effect on your next user message.
banner.paletteCount_one: 1 command available in the chat / palette.
banner.paletteCount_other: {{count}} commands available in the chat / palette.

errors.trailingSpace: Path segments cannot end with space or dot.
errors.extensionInvalid: File name will be saved as .md automatically.

editor.descriptionTooLong: Description longer than 256 characters may be truncated in the palette preview.

argumentHint.invalidPlaceholder: Use [name] placeholder format only — unbalanced brackets detected.

tokenGuide.title: Dynamic substitution tokens
tokenGuide.positionalArgs: $1, $2 — first/second positional argument from the slash command
tokenGuide.argumentsAll: $ARGUMENTS — full argument string passed to the command
tokenGuide.bashExec: !`command` — executes a shell command and inserts the output

warnings.argumentsWithoutHint: This command uses $1 / $ARGUMENTS but argument-hint is unset — palette users will not see argument guidance.
warnings.bashWithoutAllowedTool: This command uses !`...` shell execution but allowed-tools does not include Bash — the SDK will block execution.
warnings.pluginRootInNonPlugin: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} only resolves in plugin bundles — in project/user commands it expands to an empty string.

editor.rawParseError: Frontmatter cannot be parsed — fix the YAML to return to Form mode.
editor.staleBanner: This command was changed externally — your save was rejected. Latest contents loaded.
editor.bmadMirrorReadOnly: This file is a .bmad-core mirror — edit via /BMad agent commands instead.

create.title: New sub-agent
create.nameHelp: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens. 3–50 characters. Cannot start or end with a hyphen.
create.descriptionHelp: Describe when this agent should be auto-selected. Including <example> blocks improves auto-selection quality.
create.toolsHelp: Use the editor after creation to switch to a custom allow-list.

errors.namePattern: Use 3–50 lowercase letters, digits, hyphens. Cannot start or end with hyphen.
errors.nameUnchanged: New name must differ from the source.

editor.nameReadOnlyHint: Renaming requires copy + delete. Open the source via the ⋮ menu.

name.invalidPattern: Use 3–50 lowercase letters, digits, hyphens. Cannot start or end with hyphen.

toolsRadio.label: Tool access
toolsRadio.emptyWarning: This option creates an agent with no tool access — was that intentional?

warnings.noExampleBlock: This agent has no <example> blocks — auto-selection quality may suffer. Use the + Add example button to insert a template.

reason.nameMismatch: {{name}} — frontmatter.name does not match the file stem

reason.invalidModel: {{name}} — model must be inherit / sonnet / opus / haiku

banner.freshSpawn: Takes effect on your next user message.
banner.longStream: Takes effect after the current chat ends. Start a new session to apply immediately.

claudeMd.panelHelp: Both files are loaded into every Claude Code session — global first, project last (project takes precedence). Subdirectory CLAUDE.md files are loaded on demand when Claude reads files there; this panel only manages the two top-level files.

empty.title: No CLAUDE.md exists yet at this location.
empty.userHint: Global CLAUDE.md is included in every Claude Code session across all projects.
empty.projectHint: Project CLAUDE.md is included in every Claude Code session for this project.

create.confirmBody: An empty CLAUDE.md will be created at this location. You can fill it in afterwards.

staleBanner.message: This file changed externally. Reload from disk (your edits will be lost) or overwrite to keep your edits?

mode.appendHint: Pick the H2 sections to append to the end of the target file.
mode.overwriteHint: Replace the target file entirely with the source content.

copy.noH2Banner: The source file has no ## H2 headings, so section append is unavailable. Use overwrite or add headings first.
copy.overwriteWarning: All current content of the target file will be replaced. Continue?

errors.noSelection: Pick at least one section to append.

error.fileExists: CLAUDE.md already exists at this location.

permissionMode.planDescription: Claude only plans and does not modify files
permissionMode.askDescription: Asks for approval before modifying files

webPush.title: Web Push Notifications
webPush.description: Receive browser push notifications on this device. Works on Android, desktop browsers, and iOS PWA (16.4+).
webPush.iosHint: On iOS, Web Push only works when Hammoc is installed as a PWA (Add to Home Screen).
webPush.notSupported: Web Push is not available. A secure connection (HTTPS) is required and your browser must support Web Push.
webPush.permissionDenied: Notification permission was denied. Please enable it in your browser settings.
webPush.enableHint: When enabled, push notifications are sent alongside Telegram (if configured).
webPush.subscribeSuccess: Push notifications enabled for this browser.
webPush.subscribeError: Failed to subscribe. Please try again.
webPush.unsubscribeSuccess: Push notifications disabled for this browser.
webPush.unsubscribeError: Failed to unsubscribe. Please try again.
webPush.loadError: Failed to load Web Push settings.
